findings.title: Handle status discovery failures instead of crashing the CLI
findings.impact: When pgrep is missing, times out, or exits with any error other than no matches, list_workers() raises RuntimeError. run() calls it without a try/except, and the existing CLI dispatcher only checks the returned status code, so `dscli status` terminates with an uncaught traceback instead of returning BaseCommand.FAILURE with the intended clear error. This makes the new subcommand crash on supported error paths.
findings.fix: Wrap the body of Command.run() in the same exception handling pattern used by the other CLI commands: log `Status failed: ...` and return BaseCommand.FAILURE for discovery/reporting exceptions that should not escape the command entrypoint.
